title: It’s masks off in Newport on  ‘The Real Housewives of Rhode Island’

title: Custodial employee sues BC, alleging she faced racial and gender discrimination and was fired for speaking up
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Education Cassandra Williams, who is Black, says a fellow Boston College custodian told her that her desk was “in the back where she belongs.
” A view of the campus of Boston College in Chestnut Hill.

title: Minogue is ready to debate Healey, not primary opponent Shortsleeve
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Politics Mike Minogue says that it is time for the Mass.
GOP to "unite" to defeat Maura Healey.
Brian Shortsleeve says voters should see him and Minogue side-by-side again.

title: An underweight dog rescued in Dorchester receives care and looks for a foster home
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The Cane Corso mix, named Balboa, is returning to a healthier weight and will be available for adoption in two to four weeks.
An underweight stray dog was recently found and rescued in Dorchester.
The Cane Corso mix, now named Balboa, was rescued by Boston Animal Control April 22 and brought to the MSPCA-Angell Animal Medical Center.

title: Shots fired during home invasion in Saugus
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Local News Police arrested both suspects and say there is no ongoing threat to the public.
Two masked men, dressed in all black, were part of a brazen home invasion where shots were fired during broad daylight on Sunday in Saugus, according to police.
Saugus Police received a 911 call shortly after 12 p.

title: Joel Embiid thanked Payton Pritchard for providing extra motivation during playoff series
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Boston Celtics "He said they didn't care if I was playing or not and they hadn't even adjusted or had sort of game-plan around me.
" Payton Pritchard tries to drive past Joel Embiid.
Danielle Parhizkaran/Globe Staff Joel Embiid missed the first three games of the Celtics-Sixers opening round playoff series, but was so dominant after returning that it flipped the whole thing.

title: As former Rep. Barney Frank enters hospice, he has some blunt advice for his party
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Politics Frank, 86, represented Massachusetts in Congress for 32 years.
He is now dealing with congestive heart failure at his home in Maine.
Barney Frank in 2022.

title: Small plane crashes into a pond near the Quabbin Reservoir
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The pilot was rescued and transported to a hospital, authorities say.
A plane that crashed into a pond near the Quabbin Reservoir in New Salem on Friday was removed from the water on Sunday, authorities said.
Emergency crews were called to the Quabbin Reservoir around 7:40 p.
